case_title: TITANIA TZENG et al VS. MATTHEW VINCENZO GROSHONG

docket_entries.description: AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $720.00 FILED BY TZENG, TITANIA TZENG, JENNIFER TZENG, WEI-THANG AS TO DEFENDANT GROSHONG, MATTHEW VINCENZO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TZENG, JENNIFER TZENG, WEI-THANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROSHONG, MATTHEW VINCENZO $758.08 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $828.08, IF THE PARTIES CAN NOT MUTUALLY AGREE ON A PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT MAY APPLY TO THE COURT FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TZENG, JENNIFER

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY GROSHONG, MATTHEW VINCENZO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $720.00 FILED BY TZENG, TITANIA TZENG, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT GROSHONG, MATTHEW VINCENZO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-25-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GROSHONG, MATTHEW VINCENZO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD A PROPER PLAINTIFF TO MAR-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY JENNIFER TZENG AND APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY TZENG, TITANIA TZENG, JENNIFER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JENNIFER TZENG ONLY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
